scope.target: Approved post-v0.4 release sequencing, release blockers, disposition gates, environment evidence, and evaluation planning
constraints: Do not rewrite the completed predecessor workflow or historical source plan
Do not implement v0.4.2 or v0.5.0 scope in this task
Keep routine downstream upgrades deterministic and model-free by default

steps: Define release blocker and disposition gate semantics
Create bounded v0.4.2 backlog items for patch-compatible correction classes
Classify v0.5.0 blockers and disposition gates
Add a deterministic-first v0.6.0 AI behavior evaluation backlog item
execution.last_completed_step: Created the workflow and recorded the repository owner's approved decisions.
execution.next_action: Revise the active roadmap and create the bounded backlog items.
